dashboards.description: Unified operational, statistical, and predictive visibility into Fusion ESS jobs, combining windowed execution signals with long-term behavioral risk indicators.

savedSearches.description: How reliably and predictably are my ESS jobs executing ?

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(succeededRuns) as Success, sum(warningRuns) as warning, sum(totalRuns) as total | eval ESS_Accuracy_Rate = round((Success * 1 + warning * 1) / total * 100, 2) | stats max(ESS_Accuracy_Rate) as ESS_Accuracy_Rate

savedSearches.description: How Often Jobs Break

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(failedRuns) as Failed, sum(totalRuns) as total | eval ESS_Failure_Rate = round((Failed * 1) / total * 100, 2) | stats max(ESS_Failure_Rate) as ESS_Failure_Rate

savedSearches.description:
Displays the number of ESS jobs that experienced at least one failure in each time window.
Counts job health records where failures were reported and aggregates them per time bucket.
Each data point represents the breadth of impact (how many jobs failed), not the total number of failures.

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where failedRuns > 0 | timestats sum(failedRuns) as failureEvents

savedSearches.description: How Many Jobs Processed in Given Time Window ?

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(totalRuns) as TotalJobRuns

savedSearches.description:
Counts jobs where slaBreachProbability ≥ 0.2
Derived statistically from runtime exceeding historical P95 baseline.

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where slaBreachProbability > 0 | stats max(slaBreachProbability) as slaBreachProbability, max(avgRuntimeMinutes) as avgRuntimeMinutes, max(p95RuntimeBaselineMinutes) as p95Baseline by jobName, jobIdentifier | sort -slaBreachProbability

savedSearches.description:
Which jobs are active, and when?
Shows when each ESS job had activity signals over time.
Each cell indicates the presence of job execution activity in that time bucket, not the exact run count.

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | timestats sum(totalRuns) as executions by jobName

savedSearches.description:
Shows average runtime evolution over time.
Why it matters
•	Capacity & performance planning
•	Early degradation visibility

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats avg(lastRuntimeMinutes) as actual, avg(p95RuntimeBaselineMinutes) as baseline by jobName | eval deviation = actual - baseline | sort -deviation

savedSearches.description: This chart shows where our ESS job risk is concentrated, and whether that risk is driven by instability or SLA exposure, allowing us to focus remediation where it matters most.

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | eval riskBucket = if(jobRiskScore >= 0.75, High, if(jobRiskScore >= 0.6, Medium, if(jobRiskScore >= 0.4, Low, 'Very Low'))) | stats count as jobCount, avg(slaBreachProbability) as avgSlaRisk, avg(runtimeVolatilityIndex) as avgVolatility by riskBucket

savedSearches.description:
Shows average runtime snapshot Per Job
Why it matters
•	Capacity & performance planning
•	Early degradation visibility

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | timestats avg(lastRuntimeMinutes) as avgRuntime

savedSearches.description: Aggregates jobs by Fusion application/module

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats count by FusionApplication | sort -Count

savedSearches.description:
Classifies jobs as NORMAL / RUNTIME_REGRESSION based on:
lastRuntime > previousRuntime × regressionFactor
Why it matters
•	Detects performance decay
•	CIS: baseline deviation monitoring

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | eval regressionDriver = if(succeededRuns < 3, 'Insufficient History', runtimeVolatilityIndex > 1, 'High Runtime Variance', runtimeTrendSlopePerRun > 0, 'Upward Runtime Trend', lastRuntimeMinutes > previousRuntimeMinutes, 'Recent Runtime Spike', Stable) | stats count as jobCount by runtimeRegressionStatus, regressionDriver | sort runtimeRegressionStatus, -jobCount

savedSearches.description: Shows Jobs which are Scheduled very Frequently

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where highFrequencyScheduleFlag = Y | stats sum(totalRuns) as totalRuns by jobName | sort -totalRuns

savedSearches.description:
Aggregates execution results across all jobs.
Why it matters
•	Reliability posture
•	CIS: failure monitoring

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(succeededRuns) as success, sum(failedRuns) as failed, sum(cancelledRuns) as cancelled, sum(warningRuns) as warning, sum(runningRuns) as running, sum(blockedRuns) as blocked, sum(queuePressure) as queue

savedSearches.description:
Which jobs run the most (volume)?
Ranks ESS jobs by total execution volume within the selected time range.

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(totalRuns) as runs by jobName | sort -runs | head 10

savedSearches.description: Which jobs are Failing Most - Calculated by Failed Runs/Total Runs

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(failedRuns) as failedRuns, sum(totalRuns) as totalRuns by jobName | eval errorRate = (failedRuns * 100) / totalRuns | where totalRuns > 0 | where errorRate > 0 | sort -errorRate | head 20

savedSearches.description:
Identifies jobs with highest runtime.
Why it matters
•	Bottleneck analysis
•	Capacity planning

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats max(lastRuntimeMinutes) as runtime by jobName | sort -runtime | top 10 runtime

savedSearches.description: Highlights ESS jobs with consistently high success rates

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(succeededRuns) as succeededRuns, sum(totalRuns) as totalRuns by jobName | eval successPct = (succeededRuns * 100) / totalRuns | where successPct >= 99 | sort -successPct | head 10

savedSearches.description:
Shows jobs with:
•	20k+ runs
•	MEDIUM confidence
•	Low visible failures
These are latent risks,	Small defect × massive volume = systemic outage

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where totalRuns > 20 | stats sum(totalRuns) as totalRuns by jobName | sort -totalRuns

savedSearches.description:
Why

Shows why alerts are firing
Helps justify predictive model to stakeholders

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where alertReason != '' | stats count as alertCount by alertReason

savedSearches.description:
Why it matters
•	Detects uncontrolled ad-hoc usage
•	Supports governance & change management

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats sum(scheduledCount) as SCHEDULED, sum(adhocCount) as ADHOC

savedSearches.description:
•	Identifies:
o	Noisy service accounts
o	Rogue integrations
o	Overactive modules
•	CIS relevance: accountability & traceability of automated jobs

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats count as runs by FusionSubmitter | sort -runs

savedSearches.description: Identifies jobs where alerting and predictions are unreliable due to insufficient run history or unstable metrics

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where confidenceLevel = LOW | fields jobName, succeededRuns, runtimeVolatilityIndex, runtimeTrendSlopePerRun, -Entity, -'Entity Type', -'Host Name (Server)', -'Problem Priority', -Label, -'Log Source' | stats count as logrecords by jobName

savedSearches.description:
Classifies jobs as NORMAL / RUNTIME_REGRESSION based on:
lastRuntime > previousRuntime × regressionFactor
Why it matters
•	Detects performance decay
•	CIS: baseline deviation monitoring

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | fields jobName, runtimeRegressionStatus, succeededRuns, lastRuntimeMinutes, previousRuntimeMinutes, runtimeVolatilityIndex, runtimeTrendSlopePerRun, jobRiskScore | stats count as jobCount, avg(succeededRuns) as avgSucceededRuns, avg(lastRuntimeMinutes) as avgLastRuntime, avg(previousRuntimeMinutes) as avgPreviousRuntime, avg(runtimeVolatilityIndex) as avgVolatility, avg(runtimeTrendSlopePerRun) as avgTrendSlope, avg(jobRiskScore) as avgRiskScore by runtimeRegressionStatus | sort -jobCount

savedSearches.description: Top ten Jobs which are Likely to Fail with predictedFailureProbability >= 0.1

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where predictedFailureProbability >= 0.1 | stats max(predictedFailureProbability) as predictedFailureProbability by jobName | sort -predictedFailureProbability | top 10 predictedFailureProbability

savedSearches.description:
•	Shows ESS cluster pressure
•	Helps infra teams correlate:
o	CPU spikes
o	JVM GC
o	SOA congestion

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats count by FusionProcessGroup

savedSearches.description:
Counts jobs by computed confidenceLevel (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH), derived from:
•	Run volume
•	Runtime volatility
•	Trend availability

Why it matters
•	Shows model reliability
•	CIS: quality of monitoring controls
•	Prevents false confidence in weak signals

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | fields jobName, confidenceLevel, succeededRuns, runtimeVolatilityIndex, runtimeTrendSlopePerRun, jobRiskScore | stats count as jobCount, avg(succeededRuns) as avgRuns, avg(runtimeVolatilityIndex) as avgVolatility, avg(jobRiskScore) as avgRisk by confidenceLevel | eval confidenceOrder = if(confidenceLevel = HIGH, 1, if(confidenceLevel = MEDIUM, 2, 3)) | sort confidenceOrder | fields -confidenceOrder

savedSearches.description:
Lists all jobs currently in alert state.
Why it matters
•	SOC / Ops action list
•	CIS: incident detection

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where alertFlag = Y | fields alertFlag, JobAlertSeverity, alertReason, jobName, jobIdentifier, FusionApplication, FusionProduct, requestType, confidenceLevel, jobRiskScore, predictedFailureProbability, slaBreachProbability, stuckJobProbability, runtimeRegressionStatus, failuresLast24Hours, failuresLast7Days, lastRunTimestamp, FusionLastRunEndTime, FusionlastRunTimestamp, runningRuns, maxRunningDurationHours, FusionRequestID, lastRequestId, lastFailedRequestId, lastSuccessRequestId, longestRunningRequestId, scheduleOverdueFlag, highFrequencyScheduleFlag, -Entity, -'Entity Type', -'Host Name (Server)', -'Problem Priority', -Label, -'Log Source'

savedSearches.description:
Shows Top ten Jobs with composite risk based on failure, SLA, volatility, and trend, Counts jobs with composite jobRiskScore, derived from:
•	Failure probability
•	SLA risk
•	Runtime volatility
•	Trend slope
•	Stuck probability

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats max(jobRiskScore) as jobRiskScore, max(slaBreachProbability) as slaRisk, max(predictedFailureProbability) as predictedFailureRisk, max(runtimeVolatilityIndex) as volatility by jobName, jobIdentifier | sort -jobRiskScore | top 10 jobRiskScore

savedSearches.description:
Identifies jobs with unstable runtimes using:
runtimeVolatilityIndex = stddev / mean
Why it matters
•	Predicts failure likelihood
•	CIS: anomaly detection

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | stats avg(runtimeVolatilityIndex) as volatility by jobName | top 10 volatility

savedSearches.description: Jobs showing high predicted risk or SLA breach probability despite zero recent failures

uiConfig.queryString: 'Log Source' = Fusion_ESS_Job_Health_Source_V30 | where failuresLast24Hours = 0 | where jobRiskScore >= 0.3 or slaBreachProbability >= 0.1 | stats max(jobRiskScore) as jobRiskScore, max(slaBreachProbability) as slaBreachProbability by jobName | sort -jobRiskScore, slaBreachProbability
